## Type of Change

<!-- Check the one that applies -->

- [ ] 🔧 **New tool** — adds a new developer tool
- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** — fixes an issue without changing functionality
- [ ] ✨ **Enhancement** — improves an existing tool or feature
- [ ] 📖 **Documentation** — updates README, CONTRIBUTING, or other docs
- [ ] 🎨 **Style/UI** — visual changes (CSS, layout, icons)
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor** — code changes that don't add features or fix bugs
- [ ] 🔨 **Build/CI** — changes to GitHub Actions or deployment

## Checklist

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] I've tested my changes locally in a browser
- [ ] My tool appears correctly in the catalog
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Both dark and light themes look correct
- [ ] The layout is responsive (works on smaller viewports)
- [ ] All DOM element IDs are prefixed with my tool's ID
